summary: Subtitled talking-head interview of Border Patrol Agent A. Hernandez standing beside his patrol vehicle with his K-9 partner Beryl. On-screen captions carry his spoken words: 'and I've been with the Border Patrol', 'I love my job, and, my proudest moment is when', 'He's my partner', 'and there's not a single time that I'm not without him', and 'for our Border Patrol'. It is an interview clip with no music.
notable_text: and I've been with the Border Patrol
I love my job, and, my proudest moment is when
and there's not a single time that I'm not without him.
